paper.title: Tessera Therapeutics Features New Preclinical Data at ASGCT 28th Annual Meeting

formulations.targeting_details: PROPRIETARY HSC-targeted LNP. Same platform as ASH 2024/2025 abstracts.
formulations.formulation_notes: Proprietary LNP. ASGCT May 2025 is the intermediate data point between ASH 2024 and ASH 2025.

results.liver_notes: No liver enzyme elevation at 1-2 mg/kg reported

safety.liver_toxicity: No liver enzyme elevation at 1-2 mg/kg
safety.tolerability_notes: Tested in TWO NHP species (cynomolgus + rhesus). 6-month durability. Well tolerated.

experiments.notes: >20% HBB editing in LT-HSCs with repeat dose in TWO NHP species. 35-50% mono/bi-allelic by single-cell analysis. This is the intermediate timepoint before ASH 2025 (40%/60% numbers). Key new info: rhesus macaque data (previously only cynomolgus reported). No liver enzyme elevation is important safety signal.

experiments.payload: Gene Writer mRNA + HBB correction template
experiments.strain_or_model: NBSGW engrafted with mobilized PBMCs from SCD donors
experiments.notes: ~35% HBB correction in SCD donor humanized mice. >50% in healthy donors. Consistent with ASH 2025 numbers.

key_findings_for_project: TWO NHP species tested (cynomolgus + rhesus) - strengthens translation case
>20% HBB editing with repeat dose in both species - above therapeutic threshold
35-50% mono/bi-allelic editing by single-cell analysis after 2 doses
No liver enzyme elevation at 1-2 mg/kg - important safety data
35% HBB correction in SCD patient-derived cells - consistent across ASGCT and ASH presentations
Cross-reference: ASGCT data is intermediate between ASH 2024 (24%) and ASH 2025 (40%) NHP numbers

comparison_to_existing_data.vs_breda: Outperforms. Same conclusion as Batch 1 analysis.
comparison_to_existing_data.new_pareto_points: No new Pareto data beyond what's in ASH abstracts.
comparison_to_existing_data.therapeutic_window_update: Adds rhesus data and safety (no liver enzyme elevation). Dose range 1-2 mg/kg is relevant.

limitations_and_caveats: Press release only - selective data presentation
'>20% HBB editing with repeat dose' is vague - could be 21% or 49%
Single-cell analysis '35-50% mono/bi-allelic' unclear if this is 1 or 2 doses
Rhesus vs cynomolgus species differences not broken out
